ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, trainer, user) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the user in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the user in kilograms */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL or file path to the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date when the activity was performed */,
  "total_steps" INTEGER /* Total steps taken during the activity */,
  "total_distance" REAL /* Total distance traveled during the activity */,
  "tracker_distance" REAL /* Distance tracked by the wearable device or app */,
  "logged_activities_distance" REAL /* Distance logged by the user */,
  "very_active_distance" REAL /* Distance traveled during very active periods */,
  "moderately_active_distance" REAL /* Distance traveled during moderately active periods */,
  "light_active_distance" REAL /* Distance traveled during light active periods */,
  "sedentary_active_distance" REAL /* Distance traveled during sedentary periods */,
  "very_active_minutes" INTEGER /* Time spent in very active periods */,
  "fairly_active_minutes" INTEGER /* Time spent in fairly active periods */,
  "lightly_active_minutes" INTEGER /* Time spent in lightly active periods */,
  "sedentary_minutes" INTEGER /* Time spent in sedentary periods */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the activity */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the activity */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the activity in minutes */,
  "calories_burned" INTEGER /* Calories burned during the activity */,
  "heart_rate" INTEGER /* Average heart rate during the activity */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the activity data (e.g., Fitbit, Strava) */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device used for the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activities_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activities_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "goals" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each goal */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the goal */,
  "goal_type" TEXT /* Type of goal (e.g., step count, distance) */,
  "target_value" REAL /* Target value for the goal */,
  "target_date" TEXT /* Date by which the goal should be achieved */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the goal */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the goal was set */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the goal was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the goal (e.g., active, completed, abandoned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goals_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "progress" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress entry */,
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the goal being tracked */,
  "progress_date" TEXT /* Date when the progress was made */,
  "progress_value" REAL /* Value of the progress made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the progress was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the progress was last updated */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity related to the progress */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_progress_goal_id FOREIGN KEY ("goal_id") REFERENCES goals ("goal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_progress_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., wearable, app) */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  "device_os" TEXT /* Operating system of the device */,
  "device_os_version" TEXT /* Version of the operating system */,
  "device_serial" TEXT /* Serial number of the device */,
  "last_sync" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last sync with the platform */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the device was added to the user's account */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the device information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
